raw_output_payload.reasoning:
Need find foo in /workspace, then sort by modification date and long listing. Use find to list files, then stat? Actually ls -lR? We can use find /workspace -name foo -printf '%T@ %p
' | sort -n | cut -d' ' -f2- | xargs -d '
' ls -l. But if multiple? Simpler: find /workspace -name foo -printf '%T@ %p
' | sort -n | cut -d' ' -f2- | xargs -d '
' ls -l. Provide one line.
